original: God, that smells delicious...
You try to contain the watering of your mouth as you watch the lewd display in front of you. What you wouldn’t give for a taste of that sweet cream...
You roll aside, letting the net go clattering off into the darkness.
You try and dodge, but too late! You give a yelp as the heavy net carries you down to the ground, entangling you!
You can’t win against a body like mine... I’m so above your class, offworlder. Just submit, like you know you want to
You look away from her tantalizing display, doing your best to contain your lust.
You can’t deny the growing heat in your loins as the nyrea puts on a show for you, all but inviting you into her embrace...
You duck aside, letting her momentum carry her past you.
She turns the blade at the last second, slamming the blunted haft of the spear into your chest, throwing you back with the force of the blow!
face.
Luckily, your head is protected and you quickly wipe the cock-drool off.
[pc.face].
You wipe her cock-drool off with disgust.
Unwittingly, you breathe in at that exact moment, getting a full blast of the potent sexual aroma the insectile beauty is giving off.

You tumble out of the way in the nick of time, looking back to see the huntress crash into the ground, nearly falling over thanks to the force of her attack. She staggers to her feet and scowls. “You wanted to do this the hard way!”
You cry out as the spear crashes into you, throwing you to the ground with nearly bonecrushing force.
You blink hard
thankful your shields held
wiping blood from your brow
as your vision swims. The nyrea, battered herself, scowls at you. “You wanted to do this the hard way!”
